category_sources: Official GitHub README describes tvnamer as a utility for renaming TV episode files.
source_facts.description says it is an automatic TV episode file renamer using thetvdb.com data.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title is tvnamer.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation, usage, configuration, and command-line documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe TV episode renaming and metadata lookup.
